review_blocker_summary: Hopper requested treating repo-local run metadata as untrusted for external DB paths; resolved with db_path_trusted metadata and rejection of crafted external db_path values
Hopper requested stronger symlink handling around metadata reads; resolved with no-follow metadata file reads where supported plus persisted DB path constraints
Lamport requested redaction for JSON-RPC errors, not just tool payloads; resolved by applying diagnostic redaction in rpcError
Lamport requested explicit MCP string argument validation; resolved with required and optional string type checks and typed invalid_arguments errors
Lamport requested object-only payload JSON or relaxed docs; resolved by enforcing JSON object payloads and adding CLI/MCP coverage
Lamport requested broader secret marker coverage; resolved with common key/value and JSON key redaction patterns
